These strategies offer opportunities to manage capital gains tax effectively.

topStories.title: Trump's personal number is up for sale, report says - and CEOs, crypto investors are paying to get it
topStories.description: Donald Trump's personal mobile number has become Washington DC's most traded commodity, with CEOs offering cash and crypto investors offering cryptocurrency to obtain it, according to an investigation by The Atlantic.

topStories.title: Rahul Gandhi writes to PM Modi, seeks Bharat Ratna for BSP founder Kanshi Ram: ‘Deeply felt’
topStories.description: Congress leader Rahul Gandhi's letter came as the nation commemorated Kanshi Ram's birth anniversary on Sunday, March 15.

topStories.title: Rahul writes to PM Modi, seeks Bharat Ratna for BSP founder Kanshi Ram
topStories.description: As we commemorate the birth anniversary of Kanshi Ramji today and reflect on his legacy and contributions, I write with a request that he be awarded the Bharat Ratna posthumously, says Congress leader Rahul Gandhi

dailyNews.title: American Heart Association Releases Cholesterol Management Guidelines
dailyNews.description: The update was jointly published in the journal Circulation and the Journal of the American College of Cardiology. The recent guideline is retitled the 2026 Guideline on the Management of Dyslipidemia...

dailyNews.description: Govt spokesperson Fatemeh Mohajerani says US-Israeli strikes have damaged more than 42,000 civilian sites across Iran.

dailyNews.description: US president says his country may carry out more strikes on oil hub as he urges allies to help open Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: Iran war: What is happening on day 16 of US-Israel attacks?
dailyNews.description: Israel and US attacks on Isfahan kills 15 people as Tehran carries out retaliatory attacks on Israel and Gulf countries.

dailyNews.title: MotoGP postpones Qatar Grand Prix due to Middle East conflict
dailyNews.description: The Qatar GP, scheduled for April 10-12, has been rescheduled for November amid the ongoing US-Israel war on Iran.

dailyNews.description: Activists rally outside White House against war with Iran

dailyNews.title: The real reason for sagging jowls, and what will and won't help, according to an expert
dailyNews.description: Jowls often appear suddenly but develop over years as collagen declines and facial fat shifts, a dermatologist says. Prevention and layered treatments matter more than trendy fixes.

dailyNews.title: Pentagon identifies 6 US airmen killed in refueling tanker crash in Iraq after mid-air collision
dailyNews.description: The War Department confirmed the identifies of the six U.S. airmen who were killed when a KC-135 refueling aircraft crashed in western Iraq during a mission.

dailyNews.title: I reluctantly went to my first Grateful Dead show — and discovered one of Earth’s great religions
dailyNews.description: From reluctant concert-goer to devoted Deadhead, one fan's transformative journey following Jerry Garcia and the Grateful Dead reveals music as religion and community.

dailyNews.title: Amanda Seyfried questions Oscars’ importance as expert likens awards show to ‘the tire industry’
dailyNews.description: Hollywood stars including Denzel Washington and Matt Damon reveal why they don't care about winning Oscars despite their multiple nominations and acclaim.

dailyNews.title: Manchin blasts Cornyn for abandoning stance he once backed: 'Deeply disappointing'
dailyNews.description: Former Sen. Joe Manchin accused John Cornyn of abandoning his long-standing support for the filibuster for political convenience, calling the reversal "deeply disappointing."

dailyNews.title: Archaeologists uncover lost medieval city that vanished without a trace: 'True time capsule'
dailyNews.description: Archaeologists have discovered the lost medieval town of Stolzenberg in a Polish forest, uncovering more than 400 artifacts and new clues about why the town mysteriously vanished.

dailyNews.title: Anti-Trump Oscar nominees abound as ceremony looks to navigate fraught political scene
dailyNews.description: This year's Oscar nominees include several outspoken anti-Trump figures, as host Conan O'Brien acknowledged this week it could be a delicate dance at Hollywood's big night.

dailyNews.title: How Minnesota Beat Trump
dailyNews.description: Moms donating their breast milk to strangers, dads taking someone else’s kids to school: Minnesotans showed a basic human impulse to look out for their neighbors.

dailyNews.title: What Trump Didn’t Know About Iran
dailyNews.description: Ali Vaez, the Iran project director at the International Crisis Group, explains the history of miscalculations that led to the war in Iran.

dailyNews.title: Ukraine waiting on U.S. and Russia to agree on next round of peace talks
dailyNews.description: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy says he is ready for the next trilateral peace talks with the U.S. and Russia, but the meeting depends on Washington and Moscow.

dailyNews.title: Trump says he's not ready to make a deal with Iran as Gulf countries report new attacks
dailyNews.description: The war, which shows no signs of ending soon, has upended global air travel, disrupted oil exports from the region and sent fuel prices rising across the world.

dailyNews.title: U.S. intel shows Iran's late leader was wary of son in power, sources say
dailyNews.description: U.S. intelligence has circulated to President Trump's inner circle that Iran's late supreme leader had misgivings about his son replacing him, viewing Ayatollah Mojtaba Khamenei as not very bright.

dailyNews.title: FCC Chair Brendan Carr says broadcast licenses are not a "property right"
dailyNews.description: In an exclusive interview with CBS News Saturday, Federal Communications Chair Brendan Carr doubled down on his warning that broadcast licenses could be revoked amid President Trump's criticisms of media coverage of the war in Iran.

dailyNews.title: White House proposes new underground visitor screening facility
dailyNews.description: The Trump administration has proposed the construction of an underground facility to screen visitors to the White House.

dailyNews.title: FCC chair threatens broadcast licenses as Trump criticizes Iran war coverage
dailyNews.description: Federal Communications Commission Chair Brendan Carr did not name specific networks, but his post included a reference to a Saturday morning Truth Social post from the president.

dailyNews.title: FCC chair slams broadcasters after Trump disputes reports on Iran-damaged U.S. tankers
dailyNews.description: FCC Chair Brendan Carr blasted broadcasters shortly after President Donald Trump called reports that Iran struck five U.S. tanker planes "fake news."

dailyNews.title: Trump says he thinks Russian leader Putin is helping Iran in war
dailyNews.description: Russian leaders told President Trump they aren't sharing intelligence with Iran as it fights the U.S. and Israel, special envoy Steve Witkoff said this week.

dailyNews.title: Did tariff dividend checks just become more likely? Economists weigh in
dailyNews.description: Months after President Donald Trump suggested sending Americans a $2,000 tariff dividend check, there's a chance households could see that stimulus in 2026.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says Colombia Will Accept Deportees, Ending Tariff Standoff
dailyNews.description: The president has made immigration an early priority to start second term, with ICE making more than 900 arrests Sunday.
